name: pyukumuku
flavor_text: It’s covered in a slime that keeps its skin moist, allowing it to stay on land for days without drying up.

moves.name: harden
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: bide
moves.effect: User waits for two turns, then hits back for twice the damage it took.

moves.name: mud-sport
moves.effect: Halves all Electric-type damage.

moves.name: water-sport
moves.effect: Halves all Fire-type damage.

moves.name: counter
moves.effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last physical hit it took.

moves.name: purify
moves.effect: Cures the target of a major status ailment and heals the user for 50% of its max HP.

moves.name: curse
moves.effect: Ghosts pay half their max HP to hurt the target every turn.  Others decrease Speed but raise Attack and Defense.

moves.name: gastro-acid
moves.effect: Nullifies target’s ability until it leaves battle.

moves.name: pain-split
moves.effect: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.

moves.name: recover
moves.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.

moves.name: soak
moves.effect: Changes the target’s type to Water.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: memento
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by two stages.  User faints.

moves.name: attract
moves.effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.

moves.name: baton-pass
moves.effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.

moves.name: confide
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: hail
moves.effect: Changes the weather to a hailstorm for five turns.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: light-screen
moves.effect: Reduces damage from special attacks by 50% for five turns.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: psych-up
moves.effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.

moves.name: quash
moves.effect: Makes the target act last this turn.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

moves.name: reflect
moves.effect: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: safeguard
moves.effect: Protects the user’s field from major status ailments and confusion for five turns.

moves.name: screech
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.

moves.name: venom-drench
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by one stage if it is poisoned.

moves.name: bestow
moves.effect: Gives the user’s held item to the target.

moves.name: mirror-coat
moves.effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last special hit it took.

moves.name: spite
moves.effect: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

moves.name: tickle
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense by one stage.

moves.name: block
moves.effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.

moves.name: recycle
moves.effect: User recovers the item it last used up.

abilitiesDetailed.name: innards-out
abilitiesDetailed.effect: When this Pokémon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokémon had remaining.

abilitiesDetailed.name: unaware
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for damage and accuracy calculation.
